title: âš¡ Bolt: [performance improvement]
body:
ðŸ’¡ What: Changed the way `MetricsFuture` tracks request methods and routes by storing `axum::http::Method` and `axum::extract::MatchedPath` directly instead of pre-allocating strings.
ðŸŽ¯ Why: Calling `.to_string()` on the method and `.to_owned()` on the route proactively allocates strings on the heap before they are strictly needed.
ðŸ“Š Impact: Eliminates two heap allocations per HTTP request on the hot path.
ðŸ”¬ Measurement: Run `cargo bench` (if available) or observe allocation count during a load test with a profiler like `dhat`. `cargo test -p autumn-web --lib middleware::metrics` confirms logic remains intact.
head: bolt/metrics-zero-alloc
